title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Allow While Using App is selected
scenario: Location permission dialog for Find My Device does not reappear after initial 'Allow While Using App' selection during first-time onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
3. When the location sharing dialog appears, tap 'Allow While Using App'.
4. Navigate to App Settings → Find My Device.
5. Observe that the Find My Device screen is displayed without any additional location dialog.
6. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate again to App Settings → Find My Device.
expected: The Find My Device screen is displayed without any additional location dialog, and the user is not asked for location consent again.
